params.name: Lion Oath Ring
params.description: Crafted from pure gold, this ring features twin lion heads facing each other with bared fangs and flame-like manes carved in relief. The circular design embodies the eternal sun and divine authority. Rulers bestowed it to confirm loyalty - those who received it swore oaths of fealty, upholding the sacred tradition of royal legitimacy.
